view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for two-way SMS functionality.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for two-way SMS functionality.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for two-way SMS functionality.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the two-way SMS feature, specifically that customers can reply to confirm, cancel, or reschedule appointments. However, the evidence provided does not include any API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate this functionality. While there are examples of SMS messages that imply this capability, there is no concrete evidence confirming the implementation of the required two-way communication, leading to an inconclusive status.
